S.FORM: == Marques Bragg == kawas tay 1970, ryax sa tay 24 nqu tay 3, Marques Bragg, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
== Marques Bragg == kawas tay 1970, ryax sa tay 24 nqu tay 3, Marques Bragg, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: == marques~ɕ βraɣɣ == kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, marques~ɕ βraɣɣ, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
